CommunityApplications.Profile: Unraid templates for [OpenHabitTracker](https://openhabittracker.net) - take Markdown notes, plan tasks, track habits. Free, ad-free, open source (GPL-3.0), no account required. The Docker image is the self-hosted sync server: native apps for Windows, Linux, Android, iOS and macOS log into it and sync. Maintained by the app author in the app's own repository.
